title: Update Hero Card Content and Fix Medical History Background Color

requirements.text: Replace the main Hero/Welcome card text at the top of the Basic Information page with the exact provided content. Title: 'Get Your Health Readiness Score'. Subtitle: 'जानें अपना हेल्थ रेडीनेस स्कोर'. Description: 'Difference Between Current Habits & Optimal Health Lifestyle. Discover The Current Condition of Your Body & Understand What kind of Care, Correction & Routine Adjustment it Needs — and when.' Hindi Description: 'आपकी आज की आदतों और आपकी सबसे बेहतरीन सेहत के बीच का फासला.' Benefits list: '1. You'll Get to Know Your Health More Closely & Find Out How Ready You are for a Change. 2. Through Guided Questions, You will Recognize what Healthy Habits You are Missing. 3. You will Identify Small Daily Routine Mistakes that may be Creating Long-Term Health Problems.' Preserve all structural UI elements, form fields, toggles, and buttons on the page.

quotes: STRICT CONTENT LOCK: Use the EXACT text provided below for the Header Card. Do NOT auto-improve, translate, or change a single word.
Replace ONLY the text in the Header Card with my exact provided text. Preserve all other structural UI elements, form fields, toggles, and buttons on the page.

acceptanceCriteria: Hero card displays exact title 'Get Your Health Readiness Score'
Hindi subtitle 'जानें अपना हेल्थ रेडीनेस स्कोर' is displayed
Full English and Hindi descriptions appear as provided
All three benefit points are listed exactly as written
No text modifications or translations applied
All existing form fields and buttons remain unchanged

requirements.text: Change the Medical History card background color to a very light pale mint/sage green (#EBF3ED). Keep the card's current position, layout, and all existing styling exactly the same. Ensure text remains highly readable with premium appearance.

quotes: ONLY change the background color to a very light pale mint/sage green (like #EBF3ED) so it looks premium and text remains highly readable.
Keep its position and layout exactly the same.

acceptanceCriteria: Medical History card background is set to #EBF3ED or similar very light sage green
Card position and layout remain identical to Version 27
Text contrast is maintained for readability

constraints: Do not modify any text content in the Hero card beyond replacing it with the exact provided text
Do not change any structural UI elements, form fields, toggles, or buttons on the Basic Information page
Medical History card position and layout must remain exactly as in Version 27
nonGoals: Auto-improving or translating the provided content
Changing any other card backgrounds or colors
Updating any other page sections or components
